name_en: High-end GG Marmont Series Black Gunmetal
name_cn:
High-end GG Marmont Series Black Gunmetal
GG Marmont Series metal chain mini shoulder bag, soft structured, oversized flap accented with double G hardware. The new colorway features quilted V-shaped leather paired with monochrome hardware. The adjustable chain strap is ingeniously designed, offering versatile ways to wear it, freely switching between shoulder and hand-carry.
Size: 26*15*7cm
Style No.: 443497
